'''majopo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:iwagumi|iwagumi]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-j-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:iwagumi|iwagumi]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| majopo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:mæjepeth|mæjepeth]] || [[word:mæjepej|mæjepej]] || [[word:mæjepesh|mæjepesh]] || [[word:mæjepe|mæjepe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:majojopoth|majojopoth]] || [[word:majojopoj|majojopoj]] || [[word:majojoposh|majojoposh]] || [[word:majojopo|majojopo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:majopoth|majopoth]] || [[word:majopoj|majopoj]] || [[word:majoposh|majoposh]] || [[word:majopo|majopo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:majofpoth|majofpoth]] || [[word:majofpoj|majofpoj]] || [[word:majofposh|majofposh]] || [[word:majofpof|majofpof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:majopotho|majopotho]] || [[word:majopojo|majopojo]] || [[word:majoposho|majoposho]] || [[word:majopoko|majopoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:majopoth|majopoth]] || [[word:majopoj|majopoj]] || [[word:majoposh|majoposh]] || [[word:majopo|majopo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:majopothol|majopothol]] || [[word:majopojol|majopojol]] || [[word:majoposhol|majoposhol]] || [[word:majopokol|majopokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:majopothotho|majopothotho]] || [[word:majopojojo|majopojojo]] || [[word:majoposhosho|majoposhosho]] || [[word:majopoko|majopoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:majopothon|majopothon]] || [[word:majopojon|majopojon]] || [[word:majoposhon|majoposhon]] || [[word:majopokon|majopokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:majopothoro|majopothoro]] || [[word:majopojoro|majopojoro]] || [[word:majoposhoro|majoposhoro]] || [[word:majopokoro|majopokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|bfc4f79}}
